output.compositionNotes: Overall composition matches Figma reference. Dark charcoal background with rounded-3xl corners, two-column header layout (heading left, description + CTA right), gradient progress bar, circular navigation arrows, and card grid all match the design. Cards display correctly in a horizontal carousel with proper spacing.
output.crossBrowserConsistency: All three browsers render identically across all breakpoints. No cross-browser issues detected.

changesVerified.evidence: In the 1440w full-page screenshots, all card slides within each carousel section stretch to the same height. The card content areas fill the available space with the CTA ('LEARN MORE' or equivalent) pushed to the bottom via flex-col + mt-auto. This matches the Figma design which shows equal-height cards with flex-[1_0_0] and self-stretch behavior.
changesVerified.verified: swiper-slide class is 'swiper-slide h-auto!' without self-start

changesVerified.evidence: CSS rules correctly added at resources/css/screen/swiper.css lines 142-151. Scoped to .dynamic-content-carousel .card-post and .card-team-member with scale(1.05) and 0.3s ease transition. Matches the Archive block pattern exactly. Cannot verify hover state visually in static screenshots, but code implementation is correct.
changesVerified.verified: CSS rules present and correctly scoped

designChecklist.hoverStatesOnButtons: Navigation arrows have gradient hover effect (verified via CSS). Card image zoom verified via CSS.
designChecklist.focusStatesOnKeyboardElements: Navigation buttons have disabled state styling (opacity-50, cursor-not-allowed)
designChecklist.allBlockVariationsWorking: Verified Blog (card-post), Other Initiatives (card-post with eyebrow/desc/button), Meet the Team (card-team-member), Browse Resources (card-resource), Our Policies (card-policy), Featured Posts (empty state), Hidden When Empty (policy cards), Long Heading (stress test), Minimal Carousel (no nav/pagination)

detailedChecks.observation: All visible cards within each carousel section stretch to equal height. In the Blog section, cards with varying title lengths all have matching bottom edges. The CTA is anchored to the bottom of each card.
The 'Other Initiatives' section shows heading (Anton font, large) on left, description text and CTA button on right. This matches the Figma layout which uses a 2-column header with gap-8 (64px).
Gradient progress bar (green-to-blue) visible with proper height. Navigation arrows are circular with border, positioned to the right of the progress bar. Matches Figma composition.
Gap between cards appears consistent at approximately 16px, matching the Figma measurement of gap: 16px (margin/margin-1).
Card titles use Anton font (bold, non-italic), dark color on the teal background. Size and weight visually match the Figma reference.

Card-post cards do not show the teal (#66d4d0) background from the Figma static mockup -- this is expected because the live implementation uses the actual card-post template which has a different styling (dark cards with white text). The Figma node shows a generic card component mockup. The actual card templates (card-post, card-team-member, card-resource, card-policy) are shared components used across the site.
At 768px, carousel shows 2 cards visible with proper spacing. Cards maintain equal height within the visible set.
At 375px, carousel shows single card width. Content fills available width properly. Header stacks to single column.
The 'Featured Posts' section with no matching posts shows the heading and empty state message without carousel controls. Renders cleanly without errors.
The 'Minimal Carousel' section renders without navigation arrows or progress bar, showing only heading and cards. Verified via page audit: pagination=false, nav-prev=false, nav-next=false.
